signature: begin<T>(move Dense<T>) -> Transition<T>
precondition: Input is one ValidDense owner with no incompatible borrow.
owner_result: STATE becomes sole owner of the master allocation and all payload owners.
allocation_result: Master allocation authority transfers unchanged.
borrow_result: Every old payload borrow is absent.
fact_result: Facts transfer only with the same root/version and STATE owner.
normal_exit_effect: Move into partial-state authority.

signature: init<T>(move Transition<T>,index:usize,move value:T) -> Transition<T>
precondition: index is dead, in capacity, and uniquely authorized.
owner_result: value becomes the sole live owner at index; caller value binding is dead.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: No incompatible borrow may exist.
fact_result: Affected live-range facts invalidate before initialization; successor facts follow after completion.
normal_exit_effect: Initialize one dead slot.

signature: move_out<T>(move Transition<T>,index:usize) -> (Transition<T>,T)
precondition: index is live and uniquely authorized.
owner_result: Slot becomes dead before returned T becomes live.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Affected live/range facts invalidate before the move.
normal_exit_effect: Return exactly one payload owner.

signature: relocate<T>(move Transition<T>,source:[usize,usize),destination:usize) -> Transition<T>
precondition: Source range is live; destination range is dead or exact overlap-safe successor; permutation is proved.
owner_result: Each source owner has exactly one destination and source is dead before destination liveness.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged unless invoked as the committed transfer phase after ALLOCATE.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Source/destination facts invalidate before the first payload operation; successor facts follow after the full transition.
normal_exit_effect: Direct overlap-safe relocation; no clone or source drop.

signature: destroy<T>(move Transition<T>,range:[usize,usize)) -> Transition<T>
precondition: Range is exactly live and uniquely authorized.
owner_result: Every owner in range is destroyed once and range becomes dead.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Range facts invalidate before the first destructor.
normal_exit_effect: Destroy exact live range in increasing logical index order.

signature: replace<T>(move Transition<T>,index:usize,move value:T) -> (Transition<T>,T)
precondition: index is live and uniquely authorized; value is owned.
owner_result: value becomes sole slot owner and former owner is returned atomically.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Slot facts invalidate before replacement and reestablish after.
normal_exit_effect: No placeholder, clone, double-live state, or implicit destruction.

signature: swap<T>(move Transition<T>,left:usize,right:usize) -> Transition<T>
precondition: Both positions are live and checked; equal is legal no-op.
owner_result: Unequal positions exchange sole owners; equal preserves one owner.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Unique authority covers the union footprint.
fact_result: Affected position facts invalidate then reestablish; equal preserves facts.
normal_exit_effect: Checked dynamic swap.

signature: allocate_divergent<T>(move Transition<T>,capacity:usize) -> Transition<T>
precondition: Checked arithmetic succeeds and no payload owner has moved.
owner_result: STATE retains every payload owner until relocation begins.
allocation_result: Success acquires one new block owner; failure aborts with pre-abort invariant and no normal result.
borrow_result: No payload borrow is live.
fact_result: Old-root facts remain only until committed transfer; new-root facts require ownership.
normal_exit_effect: OD-1 reserve-first allocation edge.

signature: allocate_recoverable<T>(move Transition<T>,capacity:usize) -> Result<Transition<T>,(Transition<T>,AllocationError)>
precondition: No payload owner has moved, been destroyed, or passed to behavior.
owner_result: Success returns prepared STATE; failure returns unchanged STATE and all offered owners remain external.
allocation_result: Failure retains old allocation and releases any failed provisional acquisition internally.
borrow_result: No payload borrow is live.
fact_result: Failure preserves prior facts exactly; success creates no payload-access fact until commit.
normal_exit_effect: OD-1 recoverable precommit edge.

signature: release<T>(move Transition<T>) -> Unit
precondition: STATE owns zero live payload ranges and sole master allocation authority.
allocation_result: Release allocation exactly once; ZST virtual root performs no allocator call.
borrow_result: No borrow is live.
fact_result: Delete every STATE/root fact.
normal_exit_effect: Final allocation release.

signature: commit<T>(move Transition<T>) -> Dense<T>
precondition: STATE proves exactly one live prefix [0,len), one dead suffix, and ValidDense.
owner_result: Dense<T> becomes sole owner of master allocation and payload owners.
allocation_result: Allocation authority transfers without acquisition or release.
borrow_result: Only declared result borrows may be created after commit.
fact_result: Open-state facts end; exact Dense facts are produced for the same root and successor version.
normal_exit_effect: Sole conversion to ordinary dense owner.

signature: return_failure<T,E>(move Transition<T>,move offered...,error:E) -> ExactFailure<T,E>
precondition: The exact contract is at its last recoverable point before destructive commitment.
owner_result: Returns unchanged base owner and every offered affine owner named by the exact contract.
allocation_result: Old allocation/root/version are unchanged.
borrow_result: Borrow ledger is unchanged and compatible.
fact_result: Fact ledger is byte-identical to the pre-call logical state.
normal_exit_effect: Only legal for a recoverable exact outcome.

signature: compiler_exit_policy<T>(move-or-open Transition<T>) -> declared normal result
precondition: A normal exit reaches a candidate-specific partial state.
owner_result: Owner result is exactly the lifecycle row; no writer convention fills gaps.
allocation_result: Release authority follows the lifecycle row.
borrow_result: No escaped incompatible borrow.
fact_result: Every open-state fact ends or transfers exactly as the lifecycle row states.
normal_exit_effect: REJECT every fallthrough, return, break, give, try, callback stop/error, or helper return that reaches the edge before exactly one transition_commit. Automatic action: NONE

allocation_result: Exactly allocation_disposition of the selected contract_id.

fact_result: Exactly fact_invalidation of the selected contract_id.
normal_exit_effect: Exactly normal_exit_cleanup of the selected contract plus the candidate lifecycle row.

signature: begin<T>(move Dense<T>) -> RepairState<T>
precondition: Input is one ValidDense owner with no incompatible borrow.
owner_result: STATE becomes sole owner of the master allocation and all payload owners.
allocation_result: Master allocation authority transfers unchanged.
borrow_result: Every old payload borrow is absent.
fact_result: Facts transfer only with the same root/version and STATE owner.
normal_exit_effect: Move into partial-state authority.

signature: init<T>(move RepairState<T>,index:usize,move value:T) -> RepairState<T>
precondition: index is dead, in capacity, and uniquely authorized.
owner_result: value becomes the sole live owner at index; caller value binding is dead.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: No incompatible borrow may exist.
fact_result: Affected live-range facts invalidate before initialization; successor facts follow after completion.
normal_exit_effect: Initialize one dead slot.

signature: move_out<T>(move RepairState<T>,index:usize) -> (RepairState<T>,T)
precondition: index is live and uniquely authorized.
owner_result: Slot becomes dead before returned T becomes live.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Affected live/range facts invalidate before the move.
normal_exit_effect: Return exactly one payload owner.

signature: relocate<T>(move RepairState<T>,source:[usize,usize),destination:usize) -> RepairState<T>
precondition: Source range is live; destination range is dead or exact overlap-safe successor; permutation is proved.
owner_result: Each source owner has exactly one destination and source is dead before destination liveness.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged unless invoked as the committed transfer phase after ALLOCATE.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Source/destination facts invalidate before the first payload operation; successor facts follow after the full transition.
normal_exit_effect: Direct overlap-safe relocation; no clone or source drop.

signature: destroy<T>(move RepairState<T>,range:[usize,usize)) -> RepairState<T>
precondition: Range is exactly live and uniquely authorized.
owner_result: Every owner in range is destroyed once and range becomes dead.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Range facts invalidate before the first destructor.
normal_exit_effect: Destroy exact live range in increasing logical index order.

signature: replace<T>(move RepairState<T>,index:usize,move value:T) -> (RepairState<T>,T)
precondition: index is live and uniquely authorized; value is owned.
owner_result: value becomes sole slot owner and former owner is returned atomically.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Slot facts invalidate before replacement and reestablish after.
normal_exit_effect: No placeholder, clone, double-live state, or implicit destruction.

signature: swap<T>(move RepairState<T>,left:usize,right:usize) -> RepairState<T>
precondition: Both positions are live and checked; equal is legal no-op.
owner_result: Unequal positions exchange sole owners; equal preserves one owner.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Unique authority covers the union footprint.
fact_result: Affected position facts invalidate then reestablish; equal preserves facts.
normal_exit_effect: Checked dynamic swap.

signature: allocate_divergent<T>(move RepairState<T>,capacity:usize) -> RepairState<T>
precondition: Checked arithmetic succeeds and no payload owner has moved.
owner_result: STATE retains every payload owner until relocation begins.
allocation_result: Success acquires one new block owner; failure aborts with pre-abort invariant and no normal result.
borrow_result: No payload borrow is live.
fact_result: Old-root facts remain only until committed transfer; new-root facts require ownership.
normal_exit_effect: OD-1 reserve-first allocation edge.

signature: allocate_recoverable<T>(move RepairState<T>,capacity:usize) -> Result<RepairState<T>,(RepairState<T>,AllocationError)>
precondition: No payload owner has moved, been destroyed, or passed to behavior.
owner_result: Success returns prepared STATE; failure returns unchanged STATE and all offered owners remain external.
allocation_result: Failure retains old allocation and releases any failed provisional acquisition internally.
borrow_result: No payload borrow is live.
fact_result: Failure preserves prior facts exactly; success creates no payload-access fact until commit.
normal_exit_effect: OD-1 recoverable precommit edge.

signature: release<T>(move RepairState<T>) -> Unit
precondition: STATE owns zero live payload ranges and sole master allocation authority.
allocation_result: Release allocation exactly once; ZST virtual root performs no allocator call.
borrow_result: No borrow is live.
fact_result: Delete every STATE/root fact.
normal_exit_effect: Final allocation release.

signature: commit<T>(move RepairState<T>) -> Dense<T>
precondition: STATE proves exactly one live prefix [0,len), one dead suffix, and ValidDense.
owner_result: Dense<T> becomes sole owner of master allocation and payload owners.
allocation_result: Allocation authority transfers without acquisition or release.
borrow_result: Only declared result borrows may be created after commit.
fact_result: Open-state facts end; exact Dense facts are produced for the same root and successor version.
normal_exit_effect: Sole conversion to ordinary dense owner.

signature: return_failure<T,E>(move RepairState<T>,move offered...,error:E) -> ExactFailure<T,E>

owner_result: Returns unchanged base owner and every offered affine owner named by the exact contract.
allocation_result: Old allocation/root/version are unchanged.
borrow_result: Borrow ledger is unchanged and compatible.
fact_result: Fact ledger is byte-identical to the pre-call logical state.
normal_exit_effect: Only legal for a recoverable exact outcome.

signature: begin<T>(move Dense<T>) -> exact rebuild<T>
precondition: Input is one ValidDense owner with no incompatible borrow.
owner_result: STATE becomes sole owner of the master allocation and all payload owners.
allocation_result: Master allocation authority transfers unchanged.
borrow_result: Every old payload borrow is absent.
fact_result: Facts transfer only with the same root/version and STATE owner.
normal_exit_effect: Move into partial-state authority.

signature: init<T>(move exact rebuild<T>,index:usize,move value:T) -> exact rebuild<T>
precondition: index is dead, in capacity, and uniquely authorized.
owner_result: value becomes the sole live owner at index; caller value binding is dead.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: No incompatible borrow may exist.
fact_result: Affected live-range facts invalidate before initialization; successor facts follow after completion.
normal_exit_effect: Initialize one dead slot.

signature: move_out<T>(move exact rebuild<T>,index:usize) -> (exact rebuild<T>,T)
precondition: index is live and uniquely authorized.
owner_result: Slot becomes dead before returned T becomes live.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Affected live/range facts invalidate before the move.
normal_exit_effect: Return exactly one payload owner.

signature: relocate<T>(move exact rebuild<T>,source:[usize,usize),destination:usize) -> exact rebuild<T>
precondition: Source range is live; destination range is dead or exact overlap-safe successor; permutation is proved.
owner_result: Each source owner has exactly one destination and source is dead before destination liveness.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged unless invoked as the committed transfer phase after ALLOCATE.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Source/destination facts invalidate before the first payload operation; successor facts follow after the full transition.
normal_exit_effect: Direct overlap-safe relocation; no clone or source drop.

signature: destroy<T>(move exact rebuild<T>,range:[usize,usize)) -> exact rebuild<T>
precondition: Range is exactly live and uniquely authorized.
owner_result: Every owner in range is destroyed once and range becomes dead.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Range facts invalidate before the first destructor.
normal_exit_effect: Destroy exact live range in increasing logical index order.

signature: replace<T>(move exact rebuild<T>,index:usize,move value:T) -> (exact rebuild<T>,T)
precondition: index is live and uniquely authorized; value is owned.
owner_result: value becomes sole slot owner and former owner is returned atomically.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Slot facts invalidate before replacement and reestablish after.
normal_exit_effect: No placeholder, clone, double-live state, or implicit destruction.

signature: swap<T>(move exact rebuild<T>,left:usize,right:usize) -> exact rebuild<T>
precondition: Both positions are live and checked; equal is legal no-op.
owner_result: Unequal positions exchange sole owners; equal preserves one owner.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Unique authority covers the union footprint.
fact_result: Affected position facts invalidate then reestablish; equal preserves facts.
normal_exit_effect: Checked dynamic swap.

signature: allocate_divergent<T>(move exact rebuild<T>,capacity:usize) -> exact rebuild<T>
precondition: Checked arithmetic succeeds and no payload owner has moved.
owner_result: STATE retains every payload owner until relocation begins.
allocation_result: Success acquires one new block owner; failure aborts with pre-abort invariant and no normal result.
borrow_result: No payload borrow is live.
fact_result: Old-root facts remain only until committed transfer; new-root facts require ownership.
normal_exit_effect: OD-1 reserve-first allocation edge.

signature: allocate_recoverable<T>(move exact rebuild<T>,capacity:usize) -> Result<exact rebuild<T>,(exact rebuild<T>,AllocationError)>
precondition: No payload owner has moved, been destroyed, or passed to behavior.
owner_result: Success returns prepared STATE; failure returns unchanged STATE and all offered owners remain external.
allocation_result: Failure retains old allocation and releases any failed provisional acquisition internally.
borrow_result: No payload borrow is live.
fact_result: Failure preserves prior facts exactly; success creates no payload-access fact until commit.
normal_exit_effect: OD-1 recoverable precommit edge.

signature: release<T>(move exact rebuild<T>) -> Unit
precondition: STATE owns zero live payload ranges and sole master allocation authority.
allocation_result: Release allocation exactly once; ZST virtual root performs no allocator call.
borrow_result: No borrow is live.
fact_result: Delete every STATE/root fact.
normal_exit_effect: Final allocation release.

signature: commit<T>(move exact rebuild<T>) -> Dense<T>
precondition: STATE proves exactly one live prefix [0,len), one dead suffix, and ValidDense.
owner_result: Dense<T> becomes sole owner of master allocation and payload owners.
allocation_result: Allocation authority transfers without acquisition or release.
borrow_result: Only declared result borrows may be created after commit.
fact_result: Open-state facts end; exact Dense facts are produced for the same root and successor version.
normal_exit_effect: Sole conversion to ordinary dense owner.

signature: return_failure<T,E>(move exact rebuild<T>,move offered...,error:E) -> ExactFailure<T,E>
precondition: The exact contract is at its last recoverable point before destructive commitment.
owner_result: Returns unchanged base owner and every offered affine owner named by the exact contract.
allocation_result: Old allocation/root/version are unchanged.
borrow_result: Borrow ledger is unchanged and compatible.
fact_result: Fact ledger is byte-identical to the pre-call logical state.
normal_exit_effect: Only legal for a recoverable exact outcome.

signature: compiler_exit_policy<T>(move-or-open exact rebuild<T>) -> declared normal result
precondition: A normal exit reaches a candidate-specific partial state.
owner_result: Owner result is exactly the lifecycle row; no writer convention fills gaps.
allocation_result: Release authority follows the lifecycle row.
borrow_result: No escaped incompatible borrow.
fact_result: Every open-state fact ends or transfers exactly as the lifecycle row states.
normal_exit_effect: REJECT unless the exact rebuild value is consumed exactly once into commit or an exact frozen failure result on every normal path. Automatic action: NONE

signature: begin<T>(move Dense<T>) -> partition<T>
precondition: Input is one ValidDense owner with no incompatible borrow.
owner_result: STATE becomes sole owner of the master allocation and all payload owners.
allocation_result: Master allocation authority transfers unchanged.
borrow_result: Every old payload borrow is absent.
fact_result: Facts transfer only with the same root/version and STATE owner.
normal_exit_effect: Move into partial-state authority.

signature: init<T>(move partition<T>,index:usize,move value:T) -> partition<T>
precondition: index is dead, in capacity, and uniquely authorized.
owner_result: value becomes the sole live owner at index; caller value binding is dead.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: No incompatible borrow may exist.
fact_result: Affected live-range facts invalidate before initialization; successor facts follow after completion.
normal_exit_effect: Initialize one dead slot.

signature: move_out<T>(move partition<T>,index:usize) -> (partition<T>,T)
precondition: index is live and uniquely authorized.
owner_result: Slot becomes dead before returned T becomes live.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Affected live/range facts invalidate before the move.
normal_exit_effect: Return exactly one payload owner.

signature: relocate<T>(move partition<T>,source:[usize,usize),destination:usize) -> partition<T>
precondition: Source range is live; destination range is dead or exact overlap-safe successor; permutation is proved.
owner_result: Each source owner has exactly one destination and source is dead before destination liveness.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged unless invoked as the committed transfer phase after ALLOCATE.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Source/destination facts invalidate before the first payload operation; successor facts follow after the full transition.
normal_exit_effect: Direct overlap-safe relocation; no clone or source drop.

signature: destroy<T>(move partition<T>,range:[usize,usize)) -> partition<T>
precondition: Range is exactly live and uniquely authorized.
owner_result: Every owner in range is destroyed once and range becomes dead.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Range facts invalidate before the first destructor.
normal_exit_effect: Destroy exact live range in increasing logical index order.

signature: replace<T>(move partition<T>,index:usize,move value:T) -> (partition<T>,T)
precondition: index is live and uniquely authorized; value is owned.
owner_result: value becomes sole slot owner and former owner is returned atomically.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Slot facts invalidate before replacement and reestablish after.
normal_exit_effect: No placeholder, clone, double-live state, or implicit destruction.

signature: swap<T>(move partition<T>,left:usize,right:usize) -> partition<T>
precondition: Both positions are live and checked; equal is legal no-op.
owner_result: Unequal positions exchange sole owners; equal preserves one owner.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Unique authority covers the union footprint.
fact_result: Affected position facts invalidate then reestablish; equal preserves facts.
normal_exit_effect: Checked dynamic swap.

signature: allocate_divergent<T>(move partition<T>,capacity:usize) -> partition<T>
precondition: Checked arithmetic succeeds and no payload owner has moved.
owner_result: STATE retains every payload owner until relocation begins.
allocation_result: Success acquires one new block owner; failure aborts with pre-abort invariant and no normal result.
borrow_result: No payload borrow is live.
fact_result: Old-root facts remain only until committed transfer; new-root facts require ownership.
normal_exit_effect: OD-1 reserve-first allocation edge.

signature: allocate_recoverable<T>(move partition<T>,capacity:usize) -> Result<partition<T>,(partition<T>,AllocationError)>
precondition: No payload owner has moved, been destroyed, or passed to behavior.
owner_result: Success returns prepared STATE; failure returns unchanged STATE and all offered owners remain external.
allocation_result: Failure retains old allocation and releases any failed provisional acquisition internally.
borrow_result: No payload borrow is live.
fact_result: Failure preserves prior facts exactly; success creates no payload-access fact until commit.
normal_exit_effect: OD-1 recoverable precommit edge.

signature: release<T>(move partition<T>) -> Unit
precondition: STATE owns zero live payload ranges and sole master allocation authority.
allocation_result: Release allocation exactly once; ZST virtual root performs no allocator call.
borrow_result: No borrow is live.
fact_result: Delete every STATE/root fact.
normal_exit_effect: Final allocation release.

signature: commit<T>(move partition<T>) -> Dense<T>
precondition: STATE proves exactly one live prefix [0,len), one dead suffix, and ValidDense.
owner_result: Dense<T> becomes sole owner of master allocation and payload owners.
allocation_result: Allocation authority transfers without acquisition or release.
borrow_result: Only declared result borrows may be created after commit.
fact_result: Open-state facts end; exact Dense facts are produced for the same root and successor version.
normal_exit_effect: Sole conversion to ordinary dense owner.

signature: return_failure<T,E>(move partition<T>,move offered...,error:E) -> ExactFailure<T,E>
precondition: The exact contract is at its last recoverable point before destructive commitment.
owner_result: Returns unchanged base owner and every offered affine owner named by the exact contract.
allocation_result: Old allocation/root/version are unchanged.
borrow_result: Borrow ledger is unchanged and compatible.
fact_result: Fact ledger is byte-identical to the pre-call logical state.
normal_exit_effect: Only legal for a recoverable exact outcome.

signature: compiler_exit_policy<T>(move-or-open partition<T>) -> declared normal result
precondition: A normal exit reaches a candidate-specific partial state.
owner_result: Owner result is exactly the lifecycle row; no writer convention fills gaps.
allocation_result: Release authority follows the lifecycle row.
borrow_result: No escaped incompatible borrow.
fact_result: Every open-state fact ends or transfers exactly as the lifecycle row states.
normal_exit_effect: Ordinary affine abandonment is legal because the partition is structurally droppable in its exact current range proposition. Automatic action: Built-in structural drop of exactly zero, one, or two proved ranges, then one release; it does not repair to Dense.

signature: begin<T>(move Dense<T>) -> topology<T>
precondition: Input is one ValidDense owner with no incompatible borrow.
owner_result: STATE becomes sole owner of the master allocation and all payload owners.
allocation_result: Master allocation authority transfers unchanged.
borrow_result: Every old payload borrow is absent.
fact_result: Facts transfer only with the same root/version and STATE owner.
normal_exit_effect: Move into partial-state authority.

signature: init<T>(move topology<T>,index:usize,move value:T) -> topology<T>
precondition: index is dead, in capacity, and uniquely authorized.
owner_result: value becomes the sole live owner at index; caller value binding is dead.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: No incompatible borrow may exist.
fact_result: Affected live-range facts invalidate before initialization; successor facts follow after completion.
normal_exit_effect: Initialize one dead slot.

signature: move_out<T>(move topology<T>,index:usize) -> (topology<T>,T)
precondition: index is live and uniquely authorized.
owner_result: Slot becomes dead before returned T becomes live.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Affected live/range facts invalidate before the move.
normal_exit_effect: Return exactly one payload owner.

signature: relocate<T>(move topology<T>,source:[usize,usize),destination:usize) -> topology<T>
precondition: Source range is live; destination range is dead or exact overlap-safe successor; permutation is proved.
owner_result: Each source owner has exactly one destination and source is dead before destination liveness.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged unless invoked as the committed transfer phase after ALLOCATE.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Source/destination facts invalidate before the first payload operation; successor facts follow after the full transition.
normal_exit_effect: Direct overlap-safe relocation; no clone or source drop.

signature: destroy<T>(move topology<T>,range:[usize,usize)) -> topology<T>
precondition: Range is exactly live and uniquely authorized.
owner_result: Every owner in range is destroyed once and range becomes dead.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Range facts invalidate before the first destructor.
normal_exit_effect: Destroy exact live range in increasing logical index order.

signature: replace<T>(move topology<T>,index:usize,move value:T) -> (topology<T>,T)
precondition: index is live and uniquely authorized; value is owned.
owner_result: value becomes sole slot owner and former owner is returned atomically.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Every overlapping borrow is absent.
fact_result: Slot facts invalidate before replacement and reestablish after.
normal_exit_effect: No placeholder, clone, double-live state, or implicit destruction.

signature: swap<T>(move topology<T>,left:usize,right:usize) -> topology<T>
precondition: Both positions are live and checked; equal is legal no-op.
owner_result: Unequal positions exchange sole owners; equal preserves one owner.
allocation_result: Allocation unchanged.
borrow_result: Unique authority covers the union footprint.
fact_result: Affected position facts invalidate then reestablish; equal preserves facts.
normal_exit_effect: Checked dynamic swap.

signature: allocate_divergent<T>(move topology<T>,capacity:usize) -> topology<T>
precondition: Checked arithmetic succeeds and no payload owner has moved.
owner_result: STATE retains every payload owner until relocation begins.
allocation_result: Success acquires one new block owner; failure aborts with pre-abort invariant and no normal result.
borrow_result: No payload borrow is live.
fact_result: Old-root facts remain only until committed transfer; new-root facts require ownership.
normal_exit_effect: OD-1 reserve-first allocation edge.

signature: allocate_recoverable<T>(move topology<T>,capacity:usize) -> Result<topology<T>,(topology<T>,AllocationError)>
precondition: No payload owner has moved, been destroyed, or passed to behavior.
owner_result: Success returns prepared STATE; failure returns unchanged STATE and all offered owners remain external.
allocation_result: Failure retains old allocation and releases any failed provisional acquisition internally.
borrow_result: No payload borrow is live.
fact_result: Failure preserves prior facts exactly; success creates no payload-access fact until commit.
normal_exit_effect: OD-1 recoverable precommit edge.

signature: release<T>(move topology<T>) -> Unit
precondition: STATE owns zero live payload ranges and sole master allocation authority.
allocation_result: Release allocation exactly once; ZST virtual root performs no allocator call.
borrow_result: No borrow is live.
fact_result: Delete every STATE/root fact.
normal_exit_effect: Final allocation release.

signature: commit<T>(move topology<T>) -> Dense<T>
precondition: STATE proves exactly one live prefix [0,len), one dead suffix, and ValidDense.
owner_result: Dense<T> becomes sole owner of master allocation and payload owners.
allocation_result: Allocation authority transfers without acquisition or release.
borrow_result: Only declared result borrows may be created after commit.
fact_result: Open-state facts end; exact Dense facts are produced for the same root and successor version.
normal_exit_effect: Sole conversion to ordinary dense owner.

signature: return_failure<T,E>(move topology<T>,move offered...,error:E) -> ExactFailure<T,E>
precondition: The exact contract is at its last recoverable point before destructive commitment.
owner_result: Returns unchanged base owner and every offered affine owner named by the exact contract.
allocation_result: Old allocation/root/version are unchanged.
borrow_result: Borrow ledger is unchanged and compatible.
fact_result: Fact ledger is byte-identical to the pre-call logical state.
normal_exit_effect: Only legal for a recoverable exact outcome.

signature: compiler_exit_policy<T>(move-or-open topology<T>) -> declared normal result
precondition: A normal exit reaches a candidate-specific partial state.
owner_result: Owner result is exactly the lifecycle row; no writer convention fills gaps.
allocation_result: Release authority follows the lifecycle row.
borrow_result: No escaped incompatible borrow.
fact_result: Every open-state fact ends or transfers exactly as the lifecycle row states.
normal_exit_effect: Ordinary affine abandonment is legal because every validated Dense/Hole state is structurally droppable. Automatic action: Validate sealed metadata, destroy its one or two live ranges, then release once; never repair to Dense.
